# SH GLOBAL — Premium Korean Used Cars Export

> SH GLOBAL is a Korean used car export company based in Bucheon, Gyeonggi-do, South Korea. We export premium and luxury used vehicles to Central Asia and Africa.

## Company Information
- Company: SH GLOBAL Co., Ltd.
- CEO: Sun Gwan KIM
- Business Registration: 136-09-84466
- Location: 186 Sangdong-ro, Wonmi-gu, Bucheon-si, Gyeonggi-do, Republic of Korea
- Ports: Incheon / Busan
- Website: https://shglobalauto.com
- WhatsApp: +82 10-5804-8504
- Telegram: @usedcaras_SH
- Email: changecar11@gmail.com
- Business Hours: Mon-Sat 09:00-18:00 (KST)

## What We Do
- Export premium Korean used cars worldwide
- B2B and B2C sales
- Full export documentation and customs support
- Vehicle inspection and quality verification
- Global shipping from Incheon/Busan ports
- Multilingual support (Korean, English, Russian)

## Current Inventory
- Total vehicles: 2,900+
- Fuel types: Gasoline, Diesel
- Year range: 2004-2026
- Price range: $5,000 - $725,000 USD

## Available Brands
Mercedes-Benz, BMW, Porsche, Ferrari, Rolls-Royce, Bentley, Lamborghini, Maserati, Genesis, Kia, Hyundai, Audi, Land Rover, Volvo, Lexus, Cadillac, Lincoln, Jeep, MINI, Volkswagen, Ford, Chevrolet, Toyota, Honda, Jaguar, Nissan, Peugeot, Renault, Tesla, and more.

## Target Markets
- Central Asia: Kyrgyzstan, Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan, Georgia
- Africa: Nigeria, Ghana, Tanzania, Kenya

## Services
1. **Vehicle Sourcing**: Access to 500,000+ vehicles in the Korean market
2. **Quality Inspection**: Every vehicle undergoes thorough inspection with full performance reports
3. **Export Documentation**: Complete paperwork handling for international shipping
4. **Shipping**: Direct shipping from Korean ports to destination countries
5. **Custom Requests**: Free sourcing service for specific vehicle requests

## Pages
- Homepage / Inventory: https://shglobalauto.com/
- robots.txt: https://shglobalauto.com/robots.txt
- sitemap.xml: https://shglobalauto.com/sitemap.xml

## How to Contact
Customers can browse our inventory at shglobalauto.com and contact us via WhatsApp (+82 10-5804-8504) or Telegram (@usedcaras_SH) for inquiries. We respond within minutes during business hours.
